purpose: Encode the STRUCTURE of an Arabic-naḥw LLM-accuracy study as an evaluation gate for grammar-affecting agent decisions. The dataset/questions/body text are NOT reproduced — only the tested dimensions, the headline findings, and the engineering gate they imply.

source.subject: accuracy of a free general LLM (GPT-5 free) answering Arabic naḥw (syntax) questions
source.note: cited as internal evidence; never surfaced in any public hover artifact

findings.headline: A free general LLM scored ~1/3 on Arabic naḥw, collapsing on higher Bloom levels, deeper questions, and essay/iʿrāb reasoning.
findings.engineering_reading: General LLM confidence is NOT evidence for an iʿrāb-affecting decision. A correct-looking final answer with wrong iʿrāb reasoning is unsafe and must not ship.

cell_schema.bloom: recall | understanding | application | analysis | evaluation | generation

default_gate_rules.when: depth=deep OR format=essay OR bloom in [analysis,evaluation,generation] OR level=awdah_al_masalik
level=ajurrumiyyah AND depth=direct AND format=objective AND bloom in [recall,understanding]

topics.label: iʿrāb (case/mood assignment)
topics.why: reasoning-dependent; the study's worst area; a right answer with wrong reasoning is common

topics.label: naṣb/jarr/rafʿ + jussive/subjunctive
topics.why: mood flips tense/meaning (لَمْ+jussive→past); never infer from surface

topics.label: لا النافية للجنس (absolute negation)
topics.why: construction-sensitive; لا vs لا-of-genus needs the governed noun's state

topics.label: exception (إلّا / غير / سوى)
topics.why: the excepted noun's case depends on positive/negative + connected/disconnected

topics.label: genitive construct
topics.why: definiteness + relationship come from the second term; gloss the phrase

topics.label: preposition + governed noun/pronoun
topics.why: render by referent; إِلَيْنَا≠root ل ي ن

topics.label: closed-set particles
topics.why: harakah on the content letter decides (مَن/مِن); homographs → pending

topics.label: لم/لن/لا/ما/ليس scope
topics.why: the governing negative sets tense; ما is multi-function

topics.label: form I-X derivation
topics.why: wazn fixes sense; maṣdar/participle take nominal glosses

topics.label: proper noun vs common noun
topics.why: referent guard; a name is not its root verb
